narrative: A Senior Applied Scientist at Sarvam AI, a product company, with 5 years of experience, ranked 19th due to exceptional verified skill depth. This candidate's background aligns with the JD, particularly in Deep Learning and Search & Retrieval skills like pgvector and Elasticsearch. However, their location in Kolkata, outside of the preferred Pune or Noida areas, may pose a challenge. Despite strong technical skills, minor concerns with their profile credibility were flagged, which may impact their overall fit for the Senior AI/ML Engineer role.
